creator: shepelev.georgy@googlemail.com
text:
I have the same problem with FreeBSD-7.2-amd64 and FreeBSD-7.3-i386. The address value in the error message might differ. I'm using A4Tech G6 wireless mouse.

My hardware configuration is:
GigaByte ma770-ud3 rev. 2.0 (http://www.gigabyte.com/Products/Motherboard/Products_Overview.aspx?ProductID=3097)
AMD Athlon 64 X2 4000+

I haven't tested FreeBSD 8.0 {amd64,i386} yet.

-- 
 <shepelev.georgy@googlemail.com>
